Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.

Monitor style consistency dashboards to detect unexpected voice drift across releases.
Apply template echo detector to sample batches for each major prompt or fine-tune version, adjusting thresholds using benchmark fixtures.
For editing pipelines, measure voice preservation and semantic fidelity before enabling new editors in production.
Maintain and periodically expand benchmark_fixture_library with newly observed real-world failure examples.
Use regression tests to block deployments where stability improves but agreement with human or reference metrics degrades.

State-tracking continuity checker cascades extraction errors and reports false contradictions.
Dialogue metrics overweight semantic similarity, penalizing creative or diverse responses.

Scene-to-scene residue must carry forward with controlled decay and bounded similarity.
